name: rust-skills
description: Rust development assistant with routing skills, hooks, background agents, and meta-cognition workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Layered Rust reasoning, docs lookup, and code review skills.
interface.longDescription: Rust Skills helps Codex route Rust questions through ownership, borrowing, async, error handling, unsafe, ecosystem, and domain-specific reasoning. It includes UserPromptSubmit hooks for Rust-only meta-cognition, background agent manifests, and docs/crate research workflows.
defaultPrompt: Fix this Rust borrow checker error.
